## What this does

Brief description of the change and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New agent / plugin
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -m pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` clean
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] Docs updated (README / ARCHITECTURE / CONTRIBUTING) if CLI flags, config keys, or agent behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env` stays local)

## Notes for reviewer

Anything tricky, trade-offs made, or follow-ups deferred.
